# Ehsanul Haque Siam

> AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh. I bridge research and production. Software Engineer at Ledgercross, building across the stack: backend services, React Native and Flutter apps, AI features, and the CI/CD and cloud infrastructure that ship them. Published peer-reviewed research (a Taylor & Francis book chapter and an accepted IEEE QPAIN 2026 paper). Previously drove 1.5x client revenue shipping 4 production websites at BetaScript LLC and built 15+ web scrapers with Gemini-powered AI pipelines at BDTracks. Obsessed with turning complex problems into systems that scale.
> Last updated: 2026-07-04. Contact: ehsanul.siamdev@gmail.com

## Now
- **Software Engineer, Ledgercross** (Jun 2026–Present)

## Highlights
- 1.5x: Revenue Growth

## Publications

- Unfolding Emerging Issues in the Context of Changing Climatic Scenario: 2nd South Asian Conference on Climate (Sep 2024 | Statistical Analysis & Presentation)
